ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Esate
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Continued To Nov-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Leslee Carroll, via Zoom, for Gene McSweeney, Personal Representative.

Counsel reports that funds from a pending related civil action is the only expected asset that will fund this estate and that the inventory and appraisal cannot be confirmed until then. The court reminds counsel that the information she's provided to the court this morning should have been formally presented within a petition to approve status of administration and that the court will need some form of inventory and appraisal.

The Status hearing is continued to Nov-22-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status of filing inventory and appraisal is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-29-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jun-08-1993 is admitted to probate. Gene A. McSweeney is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Oct-18- 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by Oct-11-2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-01-2021 Continued To Sep-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
